summary: Iteration 112: Frontend-only testing for Mira's Daily Tip and Voice Commands features. All 8 features verified through code review and UI testing.

verified_features.details: Component has 5 tip categories (fun_facts, pro_tips, health_tips, seasonal, bonding). Tips are personalized with {petName} placeholder replacement. Located at /app/frontend/src/components/MiraDailyTip.jsx

verified_features.feature: Daily tip changes based on day of year
verified_features.details: getDailyTip() function at line 78 uses dayOfYear calculation to select consistent daily tip. tipIndex = dayOfYear % allTips.length ensures cycling through all tips.
refreshTip() function at line 140 gets random tip from all categories. Refresh button at line 179 and 'Another tip' button at line 207.

verified_features.feature: MiraVoiceButton appears as mic icon on dashboard
verified_features.details: MiraVoiceButton component at line 508 with Mic icon. Positioned 'fixed bottom-24 right-20' with gradient background. Integrated in MemberDashboard.jsx at line 644.

verified_features.feature: MiraVoiceAssistant modal opens when clicking voice button
verified_features.details: MiraVoiceAssistant component renders when isOpen=true. Modal has full-screen backdrop with centered card. Integrated in MemberDashboard.jsx at line 650.

verified_features.feature: Voice assistant has quick command buttons
verified_features.details: Quick command chips at lines 427-444: 'Order treats', 'Book grooming', 'Next vaccination?', 'Soul score?'. Each button triggers processCommand() on click.
Status state at line 165 with values: idle, listening, processing, speaking. Visual indicators at lines 377-387 with color-coded dots (green=listening, yellow=processing, blue=speaking).

verified_features.feature: Home page shows Pet Life Operating System tagline
verified_features.details: Verified via UI screenshot. Badge at line 106-109 shows 'Pet Life Operating System'. Main headline at lines 112-117 shows 'A System That Learns, Remembers & Cares'.
SLIDES array at line 16 contains 7 slides: intro, why, pillars, score, rewards, whisper, cta. Each slide has id, title, subtitle, content, icon, and bgGradient.

test_credentials.note: Voice features require browser permissions (Web Speech API). Tested UI elements exist and render correctly via code review.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira Daily Tip and Voice Commands features fully implemented: 1) MiraDailyTip with 5 categories (fun_facts, pro_tips, health_tips, seasonal, bonding), 2) Daily tip uses dayOfYear for consistent daily selection, 3) Refresh button for random tips, 4) MiraVoiceButton fixed bottom-right with mic icon, 5) MiraVoiceAssistant modal with speech recognition, 6) Quick command buttons (Order treats, Book grooming, etc.), 7) Status indicators (listening/processing/speaking), 8) Home page shows 'Pet Life Operating System' and 'Learns, Remembers & Cares', 9) SoulExplainerVideo has 7 slides. Added data-testid attributes for better testability.

features.personalization: {petName} placeholder replaced with actual pet name

taglines.headline: A System That Learns, Remembers & Cares (lines 112-117)
